notes: Harness implementation lives at output/integration/tests.html + tests.js (per delivery requirement that the user can open it directly in a browser). This builder directory holds the per-run report.json for that harness execution. The harness drives REAL user flows: dispatch deal -> hit/stand to resolve -> click Deal again -> assert new hand. Assertion coverage: every acceptance assertion with verifier=='edge_case_testing' from sections 1-6 plus IP-level assertions where testable against the integrated artifact, plus section-7's own self-coverage assertions S7.A1/A3/A4/A5.
